final_test_output:
1	#!/bin/sh
     2	# Test for deadlock in concurrent fund transfers.
     3	# Runs many bidirectional transfers and checks they complete within timeout.
     4	
     5	set -e
     6	
     7	FAIL=0
     8	
     9	# Recompile
    10	javac -d /app/classes /app/app/*.java 2>&1
    11	
    12	echo "Running 200 concurrent transfers across 8 threads with 10s timeout..."
    13	
    14	# Run the transfer program — it will deadlock and timeout if the bug exists
    15	OUTPUT=$(java -cp /app/classes Main 200 8 10 2>&1) || EXIT_CODE=$?
    16	EXIT_CODE=${EXIT_CODE:-0}
    17	
    18	echo "$OUTPUT"
    19	
    20	if [ $EXIT_CODE -eq 2 ]; then
    21	    echo ""
    22	    echo "FAIL: Transfers deadlocked — threads blocked waiting for locks"
    23	    echo "      Concurrent transfers in opposite directions cause lock ordering violation"
    24	    FAIL=1
    25	elif [ $EXIT_CODE -eq 3 ]; then
    26	    echo ""
    27	    echo "FAIL: Balance conservation violated after transfers"
    28	    FAIL=1
    29	elif [ $EXIT_CODE -ne 0 ]; then
    30	    echo ""
    31	    echo "FAIL: Unexpected error (exit code $EXIT_CODE)"
    32	    FAIL=1
    33	fi
    34	
    35	# Run again to make sure it's not flaky — deadlock should be reliably triggered
    36	if [ $FAIL -eq 0 ]; then
    37	    echo ""
    38	    echo "Running second verification pass..."
    39	    OUTPUT2=$(java -cp /app/classes Main 200 8 10 2>&1) || EXIT_CODE2=$?
    40	    EXIT_CODE2=${EXIT_CODE2:-0}
    41	    echo "$OUTPUT2"
    42	
    43	    if [ $EXIT_CODE2 -ne 0 ]; then
    44	        echo ""
    45	        echo "FAIL: Second run failed (exit code $EXIT_CODE2)"
    46	        FAIL=1
    47	    fi
    48	fi
    49	
    50	if [ $FAIL -eq 0 ]; then
    51	    echo ""
    52	    echo "PASS: All concurrent transfers completed without deadlock"
    53	    exit 0
    54	else
    55	    exit 1
    56	fi
